title: ARTEMIS Analysis — Data Collection Form
description: Data collection schema for scientific analyses performed on heritage objects in the ARTEMIS project. Based on the CRMhs ontology (v1.2).

analysis.title: Analysis
analysis.description: The scientific analysis activity (HS3 Analysis, subclass of HS1 Scientific Activity) performed on a heritage object.

heritage_object_artemis_id.title: Heritage Object ARTEMIS ID
heritage_object_artemis_id.description: Persistent identifier of the heritage object in the ARTEMIS knowledge graph on which the analysis was performed.

analysis_was_performed_on.title: Analysis Was Performed On (HSP2)
analysis_was_performed_on.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP2 'was performed on', whose domain is HS1 Scientific Activity and range is HS2 Heritage Science Object. This field captures the general material focus of the operation — any entity (study object, portion, sample, device, dataset) involved as the subject of the scientific activity. It differs from 'object/area/sample_analysed' (HSP4), which is specific to HS3 Analysis and indicates that the purpose of the activity was specifically analytical, i.e. to detect, quantify, or assess the properties of the target. Use this field for general operational involvement; use 'object/area/sample_analysed' to identify the specific analytical target.

analysis_type.title: Analysis Type
analysis_type.description: The type or category of the analysis (e.g. 'MA-XRF', 'Raman Spectroscopy', 'X-ray Diffraction').

analysis_title.title: Analysis Title (HSP1)
analysis_title.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP1 'has activity title'. A human-readable title used to identify or describe the analysis activity, typically derived from laboratory documentation, project records, or published reports.
examples: MA-XRF analysis on Raphael's Portrait of Leo X

notes.title: Notes / Description
notes.description: Free-text description or notes about the analysis activity.

time_span.title: Time-Span
time_span.description: The time period in which the analysis was carried out. Maps to CRM P4 'has time-span' / E52 Time-Span.

from.title: From
from.description: Start date or year of the analysis (ISO 8601 or gYear).

until.title: Until
until.description: End date or year of the analysis (ISO 8601 or gYear).

took_place_at.title: Took Place At (Place)
took_place_at.description: The physical place where the analysis was carried out. Maps to CRM P7 'took place at' / E53 Place.

place_name.title: Place Name
examples: Opificio delle Pietre Dure, Firenze, Italia

place_uri.title: Place URI
place_uri.description: Persistent identifier for the place (e.g. GeoNames, Wikidata).

carried_out_by.title: Carried Out By (Actor)
carried_out_by.description: The agent(s) responsible for carrying out the analysis. Maps to CRM P14 'carried out by' / E39 Actor.

institution.title: Institution
institution.description: Institution the person is affiliated with. Applicable only when agent_type is 'Person'.

had_participant.title: Had Participant (Actor)
had_participant.description: Additional participants involved in the analysis (e.g. hosting institutions, collaborating bodies). Maps to CRM P11 'had participant' / E39 Actor.

used_method.title: Used Method (HSP6)
used_method.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP6 'used method'. The scientific method (HS4 Method) employed in the analysis, providing an abstract, generalised description of the technical or scientific procedure applied, independently of its specific execution.

used_protocol.title: Used Protocol (HSP7)
used_protocol.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP7 'used protocol'. The scientific protocol (HS5 Protocol) followed during the analysis: a formalised, prescriptive plan that operationalises the method in a specific investigative context, defining the sequence of actions, required devices, parameters, and validity conditions.

used_device.title: Used Device (HSP8)
used_device.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP8 'used device'. The scientific device (HS11 Scientific Device) employed during the analysis. HSP22 'has maker' and HSP23 'has model' are properties of HS11 and are represented here as 'maker' and 'model' respectively.

model.title: Model (HSP23)
model.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP23 'has model'. The specific technical or commercial model identifier of the device.

maker.title: Maker (HSP22)
maker.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP22 'has maker'. The agent (person or group) responsible for producing or manufacturing the device.

current_owner.title: Current Owner
current_owner.description: The agent that currently owns the device. Maps to CRM P52 'has current owner'.

used_components.title: Used Components (HSP9)
used_components.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP9 'used component'. Individual components (HS12 Device Component) of the scientific device used in the analysis. Note: 'maker' and 'model' are included here by extension of HSP22/HSP23, which will be added to HS12 in a future revision of the CRMhs ontology.

model.title: Model (HSP23 — extended to HS12)
model.description: The specific technical or commercial model of the component.

maker.title: Maker (HSP22 — extended to HS12)
maker.description: Name of the agent that produced the component.

current_owner.title: Current Owner
current_owner.description: Name of the agent that currently owns the component.

used_software.title: Used Software (HSP10)
used_software.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP10 'used software'. Software (D14 Software) used during or for the analysis, including tools for data acquisition, device control, processing, simulation, or visualisation.

used_settings.title: Used Settings (HSP13)
used_settings.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP13 'used settings'. The analysis settings (HS14 Analysis Settings) applied during the analysis, capturing the parameters, configurations, or conditions that influenced data acquisition.

setting_values.title: Setting Values (HSP14)
setting_values.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP14 'has settings values'. List of individual setting values or operational parameters. In CRMhs the range is E54 Dimension; here each value is expressed as a human-readable string combining parameter name, value and unit.

specified_in.title: Specified In (HSP15)
specified_in.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP15 'is specified in'. URL of the dataset or document (HS13 Scientific Dataset) in which the settings are formally specified.

used_dataset.title: Used Dataset (HSP12)
used_dataset.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP12 'used dataset'. Datasets (HS13 Scientific Dataset) used as input to the analysis — e.g. calibration data, reference spectra, pre-existing measurements. Distinct from 'produced_dataset' (HSP16), which captures outputs.

sub_activities.title: Sub-Activities (HSP3)
sub_activities.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP3 'has sub-activity'. Sub-analyses or sub-operations that form part of this analysis (e.g. individual scan sessions, separate preparation steps). Each sub-activity is itself an HS1 Scientific Activity and may carry its own type, title, and target.

sub_activity_type.title: Sub-Activity Type
sub_activity_type.description: The CRMhs class of the sub-activity.

sub_activity_uri.title: Sub-Activity URI
sub_activity_uri.description: Persistent identifier of the sub-activity in the ARTEMIS knowledge graph.

produced_dataset.title: Produced Dataset (HSP16)
produced_dataset.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP16 'produced dataset'. Datasets or documents (HS13 Scientific Dataset) produced as a result of the analysis, such as raw measurements, elemental maps, processed results, or scientific papers.

created_using_software.title: Created Using Software (HSP11)
created_using_software.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP11 'was created using software'. Name or identifier of the software (D14 Software) used to generate this specific dataset.

created_using_software_uri.title: Created Using Software URI (HSP11)
created_using_software_uri.description: Persistent identifier of the software (D14) used to create this dataset.

object/or/area/or/portion/or/sample_anal.title: Object / Area / Sample Analysed (HSP4)
object/or/area/or/portion/or/sample_anal.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP4 'analysed', whose domain is HS3 Analysis and range is HS6 Study Object (which includes HS7 Study Object Portion, HS8 Study Object Area, and HS9 Study Object Sample as subclasses). This field identifies the specific entity — a whole heritage object, a defined portion, a spatial area, or an extracted sample — that the analysis directly targeted for scientific measurement or observation. It differs from 'analysis_was_performed_on' (HSP2), which has a broader scope and applies to any HS1 Scientific Activity, not exclusively to analytical operations. This field is repeatable (array) because a single analysis may target multiple objects, areas, or samples simultaneously.

object/area/sample_label.title: Object / Area / Sample Label
object/area/sample_label.description: Human-readable name or label of the study object, portion, area, or sample that was analysed.
examples: Portrait of Leo X — full painted surface

object/area/sample_uri.title: Object / Area / Sample URI
object/area/sample_uri.description: Persistent identifier of the study object, portion, area, or sample in the ARTEMIS knowledge graph or an external vocabulary.

object/area/sample_type.title: Object / Area / Sample Type
object/area/sample_type.description: The CRMhs class of the analysed entity. 'Heritage Object' corresponds to HS6 Study Object (or its CRM equivalents E18, E19, E22); 'Portion' to HS7 Study Object Portion; 'Area' to HS8 Study Object Area; 'Sample' to HS9 Study Object Sample.

study_object_sample.title: Study Object Sample (HS9)
study_object_sample.description: Maps to CRMhs HS9 Study Object Sample. A discrete physical portion extracted from a study object (HS6) for the purpose of scientific investigation. Unlike a portion (HS7), a sample implies physical detachment and a new material trajectory, while retaining a semantic link to the heritage object of provenance.

sample_uri.title: Sample URI
sample_uri.description: Persistent identifier of the sample in the ARTEMIS knowledge graph.

taken_from.title: Taken From — Object (HSP19)
taken_from.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP19 'was taken from'. Reference (name or URI) to the study object (HS6) from which the sample was physically extracted.

taken_from_uri.title: Taken From — Object URI (HSP19)
taken_from_uri.description: Persistent identifier of the study object (HS6) from which the sample was taken.

taken_from_area.title: Taken From — Area (HSP20)
taken_from_area.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP20 'was taken from area'. Name or label of the specific area (HS8 Study Object Area) on the object's surface from which the sample was extracted. Complements HSP19 with spatial precision.

taken_from_area_uri.title: Taken From — Area URI (HSP20)
taken_from_area_uri.description: Persistent identifier of the study object area (HS8) from which the sample was taken.

study_object_portion.title: Study Object Portion (HS7)
study_object_portion.description: Maps to CRMhs HS7 Study Object Portion. A physically bounded part of a study object (HS6) identified for scientific investigation without being removed or transformed into a separate sample. It remains materially continuous with the parent object.

portion_uri.title: Portion URI
portion_uri.description: Persistent identifier of the portion in the ARTEMIS knowledge graph.

forms_part_of.title: Forms Part Of
forms_part_of.description: Reference (name or URI) to the heritage object (HS6) this portion belongs to.

forms_part_of_uri.title: Forms Part Of — URI
forms_part_of_uri.description: Persistent identifier of the parent study object (HS6).

is_located_within.title: Is Located Within — Area (HSP18)
is_located_within.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP18 'is located within'. Name or label of the study object area (HS8) within which this portion is spatially situated.

is_located_within_uri.title: Is Located Within — Area URI (HSP18)
is_located_within_uri.description: Persistent identifier of the study object area (HS8) within which this portion is located.

study_object_area.title: Study Object Area (HS8)
study_object_area.description: Maps to CRMhs HS8 Study Object Area (subclass of HS6 Study Object and E53 Place). A spatial area on the surface of a heritage object selected for observation, measurement, or sampling. Used to document the region of interest even when no physical portion or sample is removed.

area_uri.title: Area URI
area_uri.description: Persistent identifier of the area in the ARTEMIS knowledge graph.

area_of_interest_on.title: Area of Interest On (HSP17)
area_of_interest_on.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP17 'has area of interest' (inverse). Reference (name or URI) to the study object (HS6) on which this area is identified.

area_of_interest_on_uri.title: Area of Interest On — URI (HSP17)
area_of_interest_on_uri.description: Persistent identifier of the study object (HS6) on which this area is defined.

object_surface_coordinates.title: Object Surface Coordinates (HSP21)
object_surface_coordinates.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP21 'has object surface coordinates'. Spatial coordinates delimiting the area on the object's surface (range: E94 Space Primitive). May be expressed as pixel regions, millimetre offsets from a reference point, or any spatial referencing framework suitable for close-range documentation.

sample_preparation.title: Sample Preparation (HS10)
sample_preparation.description: Maps to CRMhs HS10 Sample Preparation (subclass of HS1 Scientific Activity and E11 Modification). A preparatory activity performed on an extracted sample before the analysis, such as cleaning, embedding, or mounting. The property HSP5 'prepared' links this activity to the sample it transformed.

prepared_sample_name.title: Prepared Sample Name (HSP5)
prepared_sample_name.description: Maps to CRMhs HSP5 'prepared'. Name or label of the study object sample (HS9) that was prepared by this activity.

prepared_sample_uri.title: Prepared Sample URI (HSP5)
prepared_sample_uri.description: Persistent identifier of the study object sample (HS9) that was prepared, enabling an explicit link to the 'study_object_sample' entity.

used_method.title: Preparation Method (HSP6)
used_method.description: The method (HS4) used during the sample preparation.

used_protocol.title: Preparation Protocol (HSP7)
used_protocol.description: The protocol (HS5) followed during the sample preparation.
